entries.text: Did you see it?
I shall pray
Whose footsteps do I hear...
Unable to resist urges. Absorb the power of the Night?
"Conspectus Adherents of the Gate Town of Liurnia" It's the book that the Scholar often reads.
I am horribly parched...I must absorb power...
I cannot say
How can I help?
I'm sorry
I do apologise
What is it?
Why give this glass to me?
A scrap of paper that reads "Tear"
I have something I'd like to ask of you
I have something I'd like to ask of you
Vassal's Journal
Oneself
Headband of the Golden Ones
Returned Leather Case
Ask to be shown to the Great Hollow
Purchase
My gratitude for the rescue
Cleansing Tear
A passage from a letter. "The ailment spreads. Too many victims to count. Might it be the work of the Cuckoos?"
A passage from a letter. "Don't you dare try the medicine on yourself. Why go to such lengths to save the Albinaurics?"
An excerpt from a notice. "The Cleansing Tear has brought the sickness to heel. Your efforts are deeply appreciated."
A line from a memo. "I will stay here with the original elixir. The power of the crystal will preserve it until it is once again required."
From the conclusion of the research findings. "The Cleansing Tear was never found. That is my only regret."
From the conclusion of the research findings. "The Cleansing Tear could not change our fate. But it still changed the course of history."
A loud sound was heard coming from the chapel
She requires time to calm herself. Let's look around.
What's this I hear? An echo in my head, not unlike an invitation... Perhaps there is something I must investigate more closely...
Now I know what to check. There is much to be done.
...First, I must determine the source of that noise...
Something happened in the far chamber
I intend to leave the Roundtable Hold
Tell them all that I died without reawakening
You are the only one I dare depend on
Give a copy of my research
Please, stand witness to our legacy
I don't know when the chance will come
One day my kind will ask you for answers
You are the only one I dare depend on
Where is the Dreglord?
About the Dreglord
What is this room?
Why did the Dreglord appear?
What is the Dreglord?
About the message from the Small Jar Merchant
About the message
A voice is heard from within the light. "We shall descend when the world desires balance."
Indicates the door, perhaps concerned
The Great Hollow
特定の評価閾値に達すると、「深さ」が増加します。評価が継続して低下すると「深さ」が減少しますが、深さ2に到達すると深さ1に戻ることはできません。
Shifting Earth: The Great Hollow is already in effect. Conjure this event regardless? Required Sovereign Sigils: 2
I wish to cleanse the rite of blood
%null%
%null%
%null%
%null%
%null%
%null%
%null%
%null%
%null%
Pay <?evntAcquittalPrice?> runes to acquire a Purifying Crystal Tear?
